creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144498
mimedefang.diff

Hi,

I had to make a few fixes to your patch:

- You forgot to add man pages to the plist
- The mimedefang-util script had an invalid shebang line, I fixed that with USES=shebangfix
- with pkgng and @sample there is no need to copy sample configuration files, it's done by package tools automatically.

Can you test the port again with this patch and approve it if you see fit?

Thanks!
